sample_titles: Botanic Hearth Batana Oil for Hair Growth & Hair Treatment Oils 4 Fl Oz | Dr Sebi Inspired, 100% Raw & Pure Batana Oil | Scalp & Hair Treatment for Thickness & Strength | All Hair Types
Dersie 100% Pure Batana Oil - Organic Lightweight Leave-In & Pre-Wash Oil for Dry, Damaged, High Porosity Hair - Scalp & Hair Care for Healthier, Longer-Looking Hair - Honduras Sourced (4 fl oz)
Dersie 100% Raw Batana Oil Paste – Unrefined Batana Butter for Hair Growth & Thinning Hair – Deep Scalp & Hair Care for Dry, Damaged, High Porosity & Thin Hair – Authentic Batana from Honduras (4 oz)
MAREE Deep Conditioning Hair Mask for Damaged Hair Treatment - Batana Oil Hair Mask for Hair Growth – Dry Curly Color Refreshing – 10 Fl Oz, Yellow
Batana Oil for Hair Growth, 100% Natural Pure Batana Oil Paste from Dr. Sebi Honduras, Prevents Hair Loss, Enhances Thickness, Organic Raw Scalp Mask for Women & Men (4.05 Oz)
sample_features: Deeply Nourishing: Botanic Hearth Batana Oil is a premium hair and skin treatment that deeply moisturizes, repairs, and promotes growth. This hair oil for hair growth helps stimulate hair follicles to encourage healthy, thicker and faster hair growth.
Versatile Formula: This 118 ml (4 fl oz) oil can be used on hair, skin, nails, and cuticles for intense hydration and nourishment.
Potent Ingredients: Enriched with natural botanicals and essential oils, it helps strengthen and revitalize hair and skin.
Multi-Purpose: Ideal for frizzy or damaged hair, dry skin, brittle nails, and cracked cuticles, providing long-lasting softness and smoothness.
Convenient Application: The lightweight, non-greasy formula absorbs quickly and can be used as a leave-in treatment or added to other products.

【Natural Aroma & Color Variation】: A naturally strong aroma (similar to roasted coffee) and slight color variation — ranging from light green-brown to light yellow-brown — are normal signs of authentic batana oil. Differences between batches may occur while quality, authenticity, and performance remain consistent.

100% Pure Batana Oil: A lightweight, refined form of traditional batana oil with a smooth liquid texture. Ideal for daily scalp care and wash day rituals, suitable as a leave-in or pre-wash oil to help maintain healthier-looking hair.

Support for Dry, Low-Density-Looking Hair: Suitable for hair that appears less full, feels dry, or is prone to breakage due to damage or styling stress. Helps support smoother, fuller-looking, healthier-looking hair over time.
Scalp Conditioning Care: Supports a balanced, conditioned scalp environment through leave-in or pre-wash use, helping hair appear healthier-looking, fuller-looking, and more resilient over time.

Moisture Conditioning Care: Helps maintain moisture balance in dry-feeling hair. Especially loved by textured routines such as 3A–3C and 4A–4C patterns, supporting softer, smoother, and fuller-looking results.
100% Raw Batana Oil for Hair Growth: Authentic, unrefined batana oil from Honduras. Rich paste texture traditionally used to support hair growth and improve the appearance of thinning hair.
For Dry, Damaged & Thinning Hair: Ideal for fragile, high porosity, dry hair prone to breakage. Helps reinforce weak strands, restore moisture, and support thicker, fuller-looking hair.
Deep Scalp & Hair Nourishment: Delivers intensive moisture and conditioning to both scalp and hair, helping strengthen roots and strands for thicker, longer-growing hair from root to ends.
Reduce Breakage & Retain Length: Helps reduce breakage, snapping, and split ends while strengthening strands to support improved length retention over time.

Intensive Weekly Growth Ritual: Designed for use 1–3 times per week, this rich paste melts evenly to deliver deep repair and thickness support. Suitable for fine, thin, thick, curly, straight, and coily hair types.

Deep Conditioning Hair Mask for Dry & Damaged Hair Care – MAREE keratin hair mask batana oil is designed to support hydration, softness, and manageability for dry, damaged, or color-treated hair. Results may vary based on hair type, condition, and application method.

Keratin Hair Treatment with Gentle Repair Support – formulated with keratin (keratina), biotin, batana oil and coconut oil, this hair mask helps smooth frizz and improve the appearance of split ends. Ideal as a conditioning treatment for hair affected by heat styling or coloring.

Hydrating Formula with Collagen, Biotin & Coconut Oil – this nourishing hair conditioning mask with batana oil provides moisture and softness while helping hair feel easier to detangle and style. Suitable for users seeking added hydration without heavy buildup.

Versatile Use for Different Hair Types & Routines – Can be used as a conditioner (2-3 minutes), deep conditioning mask (10 minutes), or intensive treatment (up to 30 minutes). Recommended for dry, damaged, curly, or color-treated hair; not all hair types require long application times.

Thoughtfully Designed Formula & Packaging – Features a noticeable coconut fragrance and a protective dual-layer jar. Twist and lift gently to open the lid. Fragrance strength and results may vary based on personal preference and hair needs.

listing.title: [BRAND] Batana Oil for Hair, 100% Pure Honduras-Sourced Raw Batana Paste, 4 Fl Oz Scalp & Hair Mask, Third-Party Tested, Mess-Free Spatula, Deep Conditioning Treatment for Dry Damaged Hair
bullets: FULLER-LOOKING STRANDS: 100% pure batana oil paste coats dry, damaged hair with rich conditioning moisture; it helps reduce styling breakage so your hair looks thicker, softer, and healthier.
TRUST WHAT TOUCHES YOUR SCALP: Honduras-sourced batana oil is third-party tested for identity and heavy metals; no fillers, silicones, mineral oil, or added fragrance means confident scalp care.
LESS MESS, EASIER MASKS: A 4 fl oz wide-mouth jar, inner seal, and reusable spatula help you scoop the right amount; the paste melts between warm hands for controlled scalp and strand application.
MOISTURE WITHOUT HEAVY BUILDUP: The raw conditioning paste works 20-30 minutes pre-wash or sparingly as a leave-in; you get flexible care for curls, coils, straight hair, and high-porosity strands.
NO SURPRISES ON WASH DAY: Unrefined batana has a naturally roasted, earthy aroma and green-brown color; we explain it clearly so you know it is not synthetic perfume or artificial dye.
listing.description:
[BRAND] Batana Oil is a richer way to care for dry, damaged, breakage-prone hair without guessing what is in your jar. This 4 fl oz raw batana paste is sourced from Honduras and made with one hero ingredient: 100% pure batana oil. Its dense, buttery texture melts with warmth, helping coat strands, condition the scalp, soften frizz, and support healthier-looking hair through your regular wash day routine.

Unlike thin blended oils, perfumed masks, or watered-down treatments, this unrefined paste delivers deep conditioning moisture with no silicones, mineral oil, parabens, hexane, or synthetic fragrance. Each batch is third-party tested for identity and heavy metals, and the formula is vegan and cruelty-free for clean, confident hair care.

Use it your way: massage into the scalp as a 20-30 minute pre-wash treatment, smooth through dry ends before shampooing, or warm a tiny amount between your palms as a light leave-in for coarse curls, coils, high-porosity hair, or dry straight strands. The included spatula helps reduce mess, while the inner seal helps protect freshness. Natural color and aroma may vary because this is real raw batana, not a dyed or deodorized imitation. If you have questions about texture, scent, or use, our support team is here to help.
listing.search_terms: unrefined hair butter dry scalp pre wash leave in treatment high porosity curls coils 4c frizz control deep conditioner natural shine brittle strands textured hair care men women thinning edges wash day routine
differentiation_notes: Adds third-party batch testing for identity and heavy metals to address authenticity and safety concerns.
Includes a wide-mouth jar, inner seal, and reusable spatula to reduce messy paste application.
Sets clear expectations for natural roasted aroma and green-brown color variation.
Positions the product as a flexible pre-wash mask or light leave-in for multiple hair types.
Differentiates from perfumed blends with a single-ingredient, silicone-free, mineral-oil-free formula.

aplus_modules.heading: Deep Moisture for Healthier-Looking Hair
aplus_modules.body: Turn dry, dull wash days into a richer self-care ritual. This raw batana oil paste melts into a nourishing treatment for your scalp and strands, helping soften texture, smooth frizz, and reduce the look of breakage-related thinning. Use it before shampoo or as a tiny finishing touch when your hair needs extra moisture.
aplus_modules.image_prompt: Photorealistic commercial product photography, mobile-first vertical composition. A woman with healthy textured hair applying a small amount of rich brown batana paste near her ends in a calm bathroom spa setting. Unlabeled amber glass jar and small wooden spatula in foreground, warm amber cream deep forest green and cocoa brown color palette, soft natural window light, clean negative space, premium wellness mood, no text, no words, no logos.

aplus_modules.heading: Four Reasons Your Hair Loves It
aplus_modules.body: Pure raw batana paste delivers deep conditioning moisture. Honduras sourcing supports authenticity from origin to jar. Third-party testing gives you added confidence in what touches your scalp. The included spatula and wide-mouth jar make application easier, cleaner, and more controlled than scooping sticky paste by hand.
aplus_modules.image_prompt: Photorealistic commercial product photography in a clean grid-inspired flat lay without any written labels. Center: unlabeled amber jar of batana oil paste with lid open, surrounded by four visual icons made from real objects: cocoa-colored paste swirl, Honduras-inspired tropical palm leaf, laboratory glass vial, small wooden spatula. Warm amber cream deep forest green and cocoa brown palette, bright softbox lighting, clean negative space, no text, no words, no logos.

aplus_modules.heading: Raw Paste vs Ordinary Hair Oils
aplus_modules.body: Typical lightweight oils can feel slippery, diluted, or overly fragranced. [BRAND] batana oil is a concentrated raw paste that warms into an oil-like texture, helping cling to dry areas where conditioning care is needed most. No synthetic fragrance, no mineral oil, no silicones, and no mystery blends.
aplus_modules.image_prompt: Photorealistic commercial comparison-style product shot with no text. Left side shows a thin clear generic oil spreading quickly on a cream ceramic tile, right side shows rich cocoa-brown batana paste melting into a glossy oil on fingertips beside an unlabeled amber jar. Balanced split composition using objects only, warm amber cream deep forest green and cocoa brown palette, clean negative space, studio lighting, no words, no logos.

aplus_modules.heading: Simple 3-Step Wash Day Ritual
aplus_modules.body: Scoop a small amount with the reusable spatula. Warm between your palms until the paste softens, then massage into your scalp or smooth through dry ends. Leave on for 20-30 minutes before shampooing, or use a pea-sized amount on coarse strands as a light leave-in finish.
aplus_modules.image_prompt: Photorealistic commercial instructional still life with three clear visual steps shown through objects only, no text. Step one: wooden spatula lifting batana paste from an unlabeled amber jar. Step two: hands warming paste between palms. Step three: glossy conditioned hair ends near a cream towel. Warm amber cream deep forest green and cocoa brown palette, clean negative space, soft natural light, mobile-friendly large subjects, no words, no logos.

aplus_modules.heading: Care You Can Feel Good About
aplus_modules.body: We created this batana oil for shoppers who want real ingredients, honest expectations, and dependable support. Every jar is designed around transparency: raw texture, natural aroma, third-party testing, clean formula standards, and easy application tools. If you are new to batana, we help you build a routine that works for your hair.
aplus_modules.image_prompt: Photorealistic commercial brand story scene, serene vanity setup with unlabeled amber glass jar of batana paste, wooden spatula, folded cream towel, palm leaves, and a small laboratory-style glass vial arranged on natural stone. Warm amber cream deep forest green and cocoa brown palette, soft morning light, premium clean beauty mood, spacious negative space, no text, no words, no logos.

benchmarks.title: Batana Oil for Hair Growth, 100% Natural Pure Batana Oil Paste from Dr. Sebi Honduras, Prevents Hair Loss, Enhances Thickness, Organic Raw Scalp Mask for Women & Men (4.05 Oz)
features: Miskito Ancestral Cold-Extraction: From Honduran Rainforest to Your Strands, Crafted from 100% Organic Batana Oil Harnesses Nature’s Primal Energy to Transform Hair with Diamond-Like Resilience & Radiance
Hair Growth: Recommended by Dr. Sebi. Our cold-pressed natural oil promotes hair growth, transforming brittle strands into strong, shiny locks while reviving thinning and patchy areas.

Deep Moisturizing: Our hair growth oil continuously releases nutrients and repairs the triple complex damage of dryness, frizz, and split ends. The Batana hair mask simulates the natural lipid barrier of the scalp and locks in moisture in the hair strands.

Suitable for All Hair Types: Batana oil for hair growth works wonders on all hair types. It helps prevent overly dry, rough hair or excessively oily, sticky hair, while reducing static breakage and resisting frizz and clumping.
Convenient to Use: Apply Batana oil to the scalp and massage thoroughly. Let it sit for a while, then rinse off. Enjoy its light coffee aroma.
